name: Rate Limit Manager
description: Manages agent request rate limiting with sliding window and exponential backoff. Prevents rate limit errors for agents calling external APIs. Pay-per-request via x402 (USDC on Base).

authentication.instructions: Send USDC on Base to the recipient address, then include the tx hash in the X-Payment-Tx header.

tools.name: check_rate_limit
tools.description: Manages agent request rate limiting with sliding window and exponential backoff. Returns whether the request is allowed, retry timing, and backoff strategy.

targetApi.description: The API endpoint or service being called

allowed.description: Whether the request is within rate limits

retryAfterMs.description: Milliseconds to wait before retrying (if rate limited)

queuePosition.description: Position in the queue (0 if allowed)
